nasb.text: especially because you are an expert in all customs and questions among the Jews; therefore I beg you to listen to me patiently.

esv.text: especially because you are familiar with all the customs and controversies of the Jews. Therefore I beg you to listen to me patiently.

cnv.text: 特別是你熟悉猶太人的一切規例和爭論，所以求你耐心聽我申訴：

ccb.text: 尤其是你对犹太习俗和各种争议都十分熟悉。因此，求你耐心听我说。

csbs.text: 尤其因为您熟悉犹太人一切的规矩和争议的问题，所以我请求您耐心听我说。
